data.title: Asante Gold Corp starts trading on OTCQX Market with symbol "ASGOF", alongside CSE under "ASE".
data.description: On July 17, 2025, Asante Gold Corporation, based in Vancouver, British Columbia, made an announcement stating that they have met the requirements to be listed on the OTCQX® Best Market. As a result, their common shares, traded under the symbols "ASE" in Canada and "ASGOF" in the OTCQX, are now available for trading on the OTCQX. This move opens up new opportunities for Asante in the international market, providing investors with more avenues to engage with the company. Asante's various listings include CSE: ASE, GSE: ASG, FRANKFURT: 1A9, and OTCQX: ASGOF for different trading platforms.

data.title: US retail sales in June surged by 0.6%, hitting $720.1 billion, with gains in various sectors despite previous declines.
data.description: Retail sales in June exceeded expectations, surging by 0.6% compared to the previous month, rebounding from two consecutive declines. The data from the U.S. Census Bureau revealed that retail and food services sales reached $720.1 billion in June, marking a 0.6% increase from May and a 3.9% growth from the previous year. This growth surpassed economist predictions of a mere 0.1% rise. Various sectors experienced an uptick in spending, with miscellaneous store retailers leading at 1.8% growth, followed by motor vehicles and parts dealers at 1.2%, and building material and garden equipment stores at 0.9%. Food services and grocery stores saw a 0.5% rise, while online retailers experienced a 0.4% increase. Nonetheless, department stores saw a 0.8% decline, and furniture and electronics both fell by 0.1%. Despite concerns over borrowing costs and trade policies, U.S. consumers demonstrated resilience in their spending habits.

data.title: British visitor Jay Birbeck explores smart vehicle section at China International Supply Chain Expo, highlighting global innovation.
data.description: On July 19, 2025 in Beijing, British visitor Jay Ian Birbeck was featured exploring the smart vehicle section at the third China International Supply Chain Expo. The event aims to display the extensive range of global supply chain technology. Watch the video at https://youtu.be/rNrc-2FeY24.

data.title: Federal regulators are proposing to reduce a key capital requirement for big banks after years of planning.
data.description: Federal regulators have recently announced a significant policy proposal aimed at reducing a major capital requirement for the largest banks, a decision that has been several years in the making. This move signifies a potential shift in the regulatory framework governing the financial sector. The proposal is expected to impact numerous financial institutions, particularly those designated as systemically important banks. This change has been long-awaited and is likely to have far-reaching implications for the banking industry.

data.title: Global rush as Trump announces new tariff threats, demanding offers from countries by Aug. 1, irrespective of negotiations.
data.description: Despite several countries believing they were engaging in sincere negotiations, the White House proceeded with its "reciprocal" tariff proposal. Countries have been given a deadline until August 1 to submit their offers.

data.title: Trump criticizes Fed Chair Powell for high interest rates, urges lawmakers to pressure him. GOP members stayed civil.
data.description: President Donald Trump urged legislators to push Fed Chair Jerome Powell for maintaining high interest rates. During the initial of two planned hearings on central bank policy this week, Republican Congress members refrained from bringing weapons and focused on the discussion.

data.title: Fed is divided due to shocks, Trump criticizes Powell for not lowering rates. Fed Chair: Jerome Powell.
data.description: President Donald Trump has criticized Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell multiple times for his decision not to decrease interest rates.

data.title: Republicans face urgent push to advance financial policy agenda in Congress.
data.description: Republicans in Congress are gearing up for a rapid push to advance key elements of their financial policy agenda.

data.title: Israel-Iran tensions may impact the economy. Oil market analyst Rory Johnston sheds light. #Israel #Iran #economy
data.description: In order to gain insight into the factors influencing the oil market and potential economic uncertainties, MM recently interviewed Rory Johnston, an oil market analyst at Commodity Context, a research service. Johnston, who closely monitors these developments, shed light on current trends in the oil market and potential risks moving forward.

data.title: TOP Ships Inc. approved to list Rubico Inc. on Nasdaq Capital Market after 20-F filing approved by SEC on June 26, 2025.
data.description: Athens, Greece, June 26, 2025 - TOP Ships Inc., known as TOPS on NYSE American, a global company managing modern, eco-friendly tanker vessels, revealed that Rubico Inc.'s request to list its common shares on the Nasdaq Capital Market has been accepted. Furthermore, the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission has declared effective Rubico's registration statement on Form 20-F linked to its separation from Top Ships Inc. This move signifies a major development in the industry, allowing Rubico to operate independently on a prominent exchange platform.

data.title: Rezolve Ai forms global services division in response to high demand in $500B AI market; secures $70M ARR ahead of plan.
data.description: In New York on June 26, 2025, Rezolve Ai (NASDAQ: RZLV) unveiled Rezolve Ai Professional Services, a global growth platform established due to increasing customer demand following the early achievement of over $70 million in annual recurring revenue (ARR). This move showcases the company's commitment to revolutionizing retail using real-time AI-driven consumer engagement strategies.

data.title: Global Net Lease completes sale of multi-tenant portfolio in third and final phase, reaching successful closing.
data.description: A recent report indicates that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.2%, the lowest it has been in 10 years. This decline equates to approximately 730,000 job opportunities being filled in the previous month alone. Additionally, the economy has seen a growth of 6.5% in the last quarter, surpassing expectations and showing a positive trend in the market. The government is attributing this success to various initiatives aimed at boosting employment and economic development. Furthermore, experts predict a further decrease in the unemployment rate and continued economic growth in the upcoming months.

data.title: Solo Brands, Inc. names John Larson as CEO, completes debt restructuring, poised for strategic growth with strong leadership.
data.description: Primed for a strategic transformation, bolstered by a robust leadership team and increased financial resources, this organization is well-equipped to take on new endeavors.

data.title: VAPORESSO marks 10th anniversary with "Innovation X" event in Jakarta, includes hypercars and celebrates globally.
data.description: In Jakarta, Indonesia on July 19, 2025, the renowned vaping brand VAPORESSO kicked off its 10th-anniversary festivities titled "Innovation X" with a thrilling event on July 18th. The celebration featured a stunning display of top-tier hypercars racing through the city streets. VAPORESSO, a global leader in vaping products, marked this milestone in a grand manner.

data.title: Trump considered firing Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell on Wednesday, but experts say it wouldn't impact interest rates.
data.description: On Wednesday, there was a brief moment where President Donald Trump seemed poised to make a bold move and potentially dismiss Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell.

data.title: Celebrating Derek Bryson Park's key role in reshaping mortgage finance history with Enterprise Wired.
data.description: The individual responsible for orchestrating transactions that reshaped the history of mortgage finance – a groundbreaking figure in the industry – is making headlines. This visionary played a key role in deals that altered the course of mortgage finance, leaving an indelible mark on the sector. With a knack for crafting transformative agreements, this figure's contributions have been significant in reshaping the landscape of mortgage finance. Through strategic negotiations and innovative agreements, this individual has influenced the industry in unprecedented ways, setting a new standard for the field. The impact of these deals can be seen in the industry's metrics, with significant changes in key numbers such as market share, interest rates, and investment patterns. This individual's influence is evident in the numbers, reflecting a shift in how mortgage finance operates and paving the way for future developments in the sector.

data.title: Strong earnings boost Nvidia's Taiwan Semiconductor and GE Aerospace in Dow Jones Futures; Netflix impact noted.
data.description: Shares of Taiwan Semiconductor, a key chipmaker for Nvidia, surged after reporting robust earnings. This boost also lifted the overall chip sector. GE Aerospace saw a similar rally following positive financial results. Investors are now closely watching for upcoming news from Netflix. Dow Jones Futures reflect the positive momentum in these industries. The post discusses the recent market movements without specifically naming the source.

data.title: Trump administration criticizes Fed's $2.5 billion renovation project, prompting review by Chair Jerome Powell. Fed publishes FAQ denying luxury additions and emphasizing safety upgrades, financial independence.
data.description: The Trump administration has criticized the Federal Reserve for exceeding its initial $2.5 billion budget on a renovation project at its Washington headquarters. Fed Chair Jerome Powell has initiated a review of the project amidst mounting backlash and claims of mismanagement and lack of transparency. In response to the controversy, the central bank released a comprehensive FAQ addressing modifications to the original renovation plans and justifying the cost escalation due to necessary safety enhancements. It emphasized their financial independence from public funds. The FAQ clarified that there are no new water features or a VIP dining room as speculated.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures: Several companies surged on Monday; CPI inflation report expected on Tuesday.
data.description: Several companies such as Circle, CoreWeave, Palantir, Roblox, and Shopify saw significant gains in the Dow Jones Futures market on Monday. These firms experienced impressive surges in their stock prices. Investors are eagerly anticipating the release of the CPI inflation report scheduled for the following day, which will provide valuable insights into economic trends. The market is closely monitoring this forthcoming data release to gauge its potential impact. Overall, market conditions remain volatile, with these companies standing out as noteworthy winners in the current trading landscape.

data.title: Nasdaq closes high, Dow inches up. Banks stocks rise. Palantir hits new milestone. Live coverage on Investor's Business Daily.
data.description: On Monday, the Nasdaq composite outperformed other major indexes. Bank stocks saw an increase in value in anticipation of upcoming earnings reports. The Dow experienced a slight increase while the Nasdaq reached a new high point. Palantir also achieved a significant milestone.
